display.name: Rovastar - VooV's Movement (After Dark Mix) - Painterly
display.author: Rovastar

annotation.technical_notes: Two horizontal custom_wave elements display high-frequency audio waveforms across the center, shifting in color via a continuous hue_cycle. The background utilizes a fluid per-pixel warp_field combined with a low decay rate in sampler_main feedback to create a painterly, organic texture reminiscent of Geiss's reaction-diffusion lineage. The warp dynamics and zoom are modulated by the bass attenuated from the synthetic test signal, while the wave spikes trace the treble.
